_comment: Single source of truth for the 2026-07-17 'sonnet pinned org-wide, no Opus escalation' operator directive (docs/design/2026-07-17-automation-structure-and-anti-drift.md, propose row + Model & effort knobs). Gated by scripts/test-model-policy.sh (#369) so the reusable defaults, self-*/scaffolded caller-stub pins, and budget-governor's opus classification can't silently re-drift from each other the way they already did once: fixer.yml's `model` default flipped opus->sonnet in #373, but budget-governor.yml's OPUS_WF_RE and its test still expected the bare 'Self fixer'/'Fixer' name to classify as opus for two days until #369 caught it.

escalation_opt_in_only._comment: issue-build.yml's sensedOpus escalation only runs the MAIN model as opus when a caller explicitly sets model-hint to escalation_value below; no caller may pin that value by default.
